name: Companion Document Creation Workflow
summary: Chat guides; Create is a temporary drafting space; Google Docs/Sheets/Forms store finished work. Templates and snippets stay in the app.

coreModel.chat: Guidance, coaching, research, and edits — always available on the left.
coreModel.create: Temporary drafting workspace on the right — blank scaffold, no finished-document storage.
coreModel.google: Final working and storage location — Doc, Sheet, or Form embedded beside chat.
coreModel.templates: Reusable patterns only — never the home for finished documents.
coreModel.finishedDocuments: Live in Google, or are copied/downloaded — not stored as app documents.

intentDetection.description: Recognize when the user wants to create a new document and route to the right Google destination.

sampleIntents.notes: Generic — ask Doc vs Sheet vs Form.

sampleIntents.userSays: Make a spreadsheet for Q2 sales
Build a survey for my workshop

when: User mentions doc, document, google doc, SOP, proposal, recipe, script, email, letter, or other text-based content
Content is paragraphs, sections, or prose — not rows/columns or questions
User mentions sheet, spreadsheet, calendar, table, tracker, plan with rows/columns
Content is tabular, dated, or list-based across columns
User mentions form, questionnaire, intake, survey, quiz
Content is a set of questions for someone else to answer

confirmation.when: Intent is clear that user wants to create something, but destination (Doc / Sheet / Form) is not explicit.
confirmation.prompt: Do you want this as a **Google Doc** (text), **Google Sheet** (table or calendar), or **Google Form** (questionnaire)?

blockAutoOpen.taskDump: If user lists many tasks at once, stay in chat — capture, prioritize, pick ONE before opening Create.
blockAutoOpen.planningFlow: If user is scheduling or time-blocking, do not auto-open Create unless they explicitly ask to write.
blockAutoOpen.distress: If user signals emotional distress, stay in chat — do not open workspaces.

left.label: Chat with Shari
left.purpose: Guidance, coaching, research, small-step questions, and post-export edits.

create-building.label: Create
create-building.description: Blank drafting scaffold — user composes here or via chat guidance.

create-ready.label: Export
create-ready.description: Choose where to work with the finished piece.

google.label: Google Docs | Sheets | Forms
google.description: Embedded Google file — chat edits sync when connected.

verification.rule: Never say a workspace opened unless all checks pass.
checks: Right panel is set to the expected section (create or google-workspace)
Split view is active (chat visible on left)
Workspace reveal sequence is greater than zero (panel actually shown)
verification.onSuccess: May confirm to user that the panel is beside them.
verification.onFailure: Say you tried to open it but it did not appear — ask them to tap the menu item or say try again.

createDraftFlow.when: User wants to draft before exporting, or destination is confirmed but content is not yet in Google.
openActions: Keep chat open on the left
Start with a clean blank scaffold
mustNot: Use a chat sentence as the document title
Expose internal storage concepts to the user

titleRules.source: User-provided title field or inferred topic from intent — never the raw chat message.

bad: I want to write a recipe for lasagna
Can you help me create an SOP?

coaching.style: Smallest first step — one title, first paragraph, first row, or first question.
coaching.researchOffer: Want help finding reference information? You can search the web and paste what you find here.

multipleDrafts.when: More than one possible in-progress piece matches the user's request.
multipleDrafts.prompt: I found more than one possible document. Which one do you mean? Reply with the number or title.

trigger.precondition: Draft has content in Create panel.

screen.heading: Ready to export
screen.title: Your {documentType} is ready
screen.subtitle: Where would you like to work with it?
screen.body: {title} — choose below. Google stores and organizes; I stay beside you to coach and improve.

afterGoogleOpen.assistantAck: **{googleProduct}** is open beside us — tell me what to add, change, or move.
afterGoogleOpen.chatEdits: User instructions in chat sync to the Google file when connected.

sheet.note: Creates sheet via same create endpoint with kind=sheet

form.note: May create structured doc when native Forms API unavailable

notConnected.message: Google isn't connected yet. You can copy this text or connect Google in Settings.
mustNot: Pretend the Google file was created
Claim the document is open in Google

doc: Copy the text from Create or our chat.
Open Google Docs and paste into a new document.
Or connect Google and tap Open in Google Docs.
sheet: Copy your table or list from Create.
Open Google Sheets and paste into cell A1.
Or connect Google and tap Open in Google Sheets.
form: Open Google Forms and add them to a new form.
Or connect Google and tap Open in Google Forms.

metadataStorage.description: After export to Google, store only lightweight metadata in the app — not the full document body as a finished app document.

storedFields.userFacing: Document type (e.g. SOP, recipe, content calendar)

notStoredAsFinishedAppDocument: Duplicate finished copies in Saved Work as primary storage
Chat message text as canonical document content

whereIsMyDocument.withMetadata: Answer from stored title, type, Google link, and project — in plain language.
whereIsMyDocument.withoutMetadata: Say honestly that you don't have a saved link yet — offer to open Create, connect Google, or start fresh.
whereIsMyDocument.exampleWith: Your **ElevenLabs SOP** is in **Google Docs**{projectSuffix}. [Open it]({googleUrl})
whereIsMyDocument.exampleWithout: I don't have a Google link saved for that yet. Want to finish it in Create, or connect Google and export it?

workspaceNotVisible.template: I tried to open {panelLabel}, but it didn't appear on screen. Tell me to try again, or describe what you'd like to create and we'll start together.

googleAuthFailed.message: Google isn't connected yet. You can copy this text or connect Google in Settings.

googleCreateFailed.message: Couldn't open Google right now — try again, or copy the text for now.

multipleDrafts.message: I found more than one possible document. Which one do you mean? Reply with the number or title.

noContentToExport.message: Add a little content first — even one line or a title — then tap **✓ It's Ready**.

messages.typeConfirmation: Happy to help you create a document{topicSuffix}. Do you want this as a **Google Doc** (text), **Google Sheet** (table or calendar), or **Google Form** (questionnaire)? Reply **1** for Doc, **2** for Sheet, or **3** for Form.
messages.createOpen: Opening **Create** beside us{topicSuffix} — we'll build it here, then open in **{googleProduct}** when you're ready. Chat stays on the left. What's the very first tiny step?
messages.ready: Your **{documentType}** is ready — **{title}**. Choose where you'd like to work with it.
messages.googleOpen: **{googleProduct}** is open beside us — tell me what to add, change, or move.
messages.googleNotConnected: Google isn't connected yet. You can copy this text or connect Google in Settings.
messages.whereIsDocumentMissing: I don't have a Google link saved for that yet. Want to keep drafting in Create, or connect Google and export it?
messages.researchOffer: Want help finding reference information? You can search the web and paste what you find here, or tell me what to look for.

tests.input: Create a document for my recipe
I want to write a really long SOP about ElevenLabs voice settings

expect.titleMustNotEqual: I want to write a really long SOP about ElevenLabs voice settings

tests.scenario: User asks where their SOP is
User asks where document is with no stored link
User completes SOP and exports to Google

tests.input: Write 3 emails, make 4 calls, and draft a proposal
